hero_subtitle: Live coaching with experts who turn what you already know into the confidence to own every interview, meeting, and conversation that matters.
metric_1_label: more speaking time than group classes
goals_subtitle: Pick your ambition — we build the path
goal_1_p: Walk into your next interview or meeting and sound like you belong there. Because you do.
goal_2_p: Stop translating in your head. Start thinking in English — and let the words flow.
goal_3_p: IELTS, TOEFL, university vivas — targeted practice that turns exam pressure into exam confidence.
how_title: Three steps to owning every room
how_subtitle: From first conversation to full confidence
how_step1_p: A 15-minute call to understand where you are, where you're headed, and what's been holding you back.
how_step2_p: We pair you with a coach who gets your industry, your goals, and exactly how to push you forward. No scripts. No apps.
how_step3_p: Within weeks, you'll hear it yourself. So will everyone around you.
learn_subtitle: Not grammar drills — real capabilities you'll use tomorrow.
testi_label: Don't take our word for it
testi_title: Hear it from people who were where you are
testi_subtitle: Real breakthroughs. Real people. No fluff.
testi1_quote: "I used to mute myself on calls. Now I'm the one leading them. It happened faster than I thought possible."
testi2_quote: "My IELTS went from 6.5 to 8.0 in eight weeks. The targeted speaking practice made all the difference."
testi3_quote: "Speexify didn't teach me English — they unleashed it. I finally sound like myself, not like I'm apologising."
trial_intro_subtitle: 30 minutes. Zero pressure. We figure out your goals and match you with the right coach.
trial_subtitle: We'll be in touch within 24 hours to confirm your time.
status_sent: You're in! We'll email you within 24 hours to schedule your call.
status_email_fallback: Opened your email client. If that didn't work, email hello@speexify.com.
final_title: The gap between you and fluency? One conversation.
final_subtitle: Your ambition brought you here. Your voice will take you everywhere else.
fomo_urgency: Where will your English be 3 months from now? With us or without us — that's the only question.
fomo_trial_scarcity: Free consultations are limited — we only take on learners we can genuinely help
